requirementMapping.summary: The approved product UI direction must be represented by concrete visual output.

evidence.summary: Design contract selects a Reference-Pack and states project-specific layout rules.
Desktop screenshot shows the implemented primary workflow without overlap or blank state.

coreDecisions.summary: Proceed with the selected reference pack and implemented screen direction.

issues.summary: Mobile screenshot still needs one final spacing pass.

residualRisks.issue: Mobile screenshot still needs one final spacing pass.
residualRisks.mitigation: Run the mobile viewport pass before final eval.
